title: Google Highlights Key Search Trends of 2025
text: Google has unveiled its Year in Search, spotlighting the events, people and pop culture moments that prompted the biggest spikes in search interest. The report shows the search queries that had the highest spikes in traffic during a sustained period in 2025. Google's Year in Search reveals trending actors, movies, athletes, games, recipes, and travel destinations that captured attention throughout 2025. The Year in Search provides an overview of key trends across several key elements, including news, people, sports, entertainment, and more. Google's Year in Search 2025 reveals Charlie Kirk topped trending searches in the U.S., followed by KPop Demon Hunters, the Labubu and Apple's iPhone 17. Globally, Google's AI assistant Gemini became the top trending search globally, showing how widely AI tools were embraced throughout the year.
